descriptions.text:
Explore interconnected areas, uncover hidden secrets, and unlock powerful abilities as you fight your way through deranged bosses and discover a mysterious world filled with danger, lore, and unexpected twists.

Kurohi combines tight platforming, overhead exploration, and arcade-style space shooter gameplay, creating a dynamic adventure that shifts between multiple styles of play. This represents an era of passion for retro gaming, pixel art, and authentic handheld development.
